title: vesicisepalum folliculiferum
intro: Vesicisepalum folliculiferum, also known as the bladder-flowered plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Loganiaceae. The medicinal properties of Vesicisepalum folliculiferum include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In traditional medicine, Vesicisepalum folliculiferum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications such as ointments and creams.
